case_title: MAIN STREET ACQUISITION C VS. ANA R. PASCASIO et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION C AS TO DEFENDANT PASCASIO, ANA R. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-03-2011
AFFIDAVIT VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION C

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PASCASIO, ANA R. HEARING SET FOR JUN-15-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT PASCASIO, ANA R.

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-15-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ANA PASCASIO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH AN ALTERNATE INSTALLMENT PLAN. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 (INSTALLMENT PLAN) AS TO DEFENDANT PASCASIO, ANA R.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION C AS TO DEFENDANT PASCASIO, ANA R.
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY FIRST INSTALLMENT PAYMENT OF DENIED FEE WAIVER FOR PARTY ANA PASCASIO

FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF ANSWER BY DEFENDANT ANA R. PASCASIO ON 5/18/11 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-21-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-21-2011 CONTINUED TO JAN-23-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE NOV-21-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-23-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-23-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT FOLLOWING STRIKING OF DEFENDANT'S ANSWER. THE JAN-23-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-23-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
